name: Bed
description:
We are reaching out on behalf of a 62-year-old single elderly man who is currently living alone in a rental flat.

He has been suffering from a severe bedbug infestation, which has greatly affected his ability to rest and maintain his well-being. Due to ongoing health issues, he is medically unfit to work and has no stable source of income, making it impossible for him to afford a new bed on his own.

We are humbly appealing to kind-hearted individuals for the donation of a single bed frame and mattress, so he can have a clean and comfortable place to sleep and improve his quality of life. If you are able to assist or would like more information, please feel free to reach out via Whatsapp 89118058 or email:hsinyu_lee@viriya.org.sg
